prompts.task: Add OpenTelemetry instrumentation to the Flask service in ./service. Assume no custom business spans are requested.
Instrument the Flask service in ./service with OpenTelemetry while preserving the existing runtime and startup command. Add auto-instrumentation only; do not add custom business spans.

judge_inputs: Inspect ./service for resulting files when present.
Read ./last_message.md for the agent final response.
rubric: Initializes the SDK once in a separate file.
Uses Resource service.name and env-driven OTLP endpoint configuration.
Calls FlaskInstrumentor().instrument_app(app) or an equivalent setup before serving requests.
Records exceptions or sets error status where custom error handling exists.
Keeps the Flask app behavior and routes intact.
